snippets.C0621:
' C0621 · FizzBuzz
Function Solve(n)
  Dim i, out : out = ""
  For i = 1 To n
    If i Mod 15 = 0 Then
      out = out & "FizzBuzz"
    ElseIf i Mod 3 = 0 Then
      out = out & "Fizz"
    ElseIf i Mod 5 = 0 Then
      out = out & "Buzz"
    Else
      out = out & CStr(i)
    End If
    If i < n Then out = out & vbCrLf
  Next
  Solve = out
End Function
